name: Warsaw Chrusciki
recipeInstructions:
In a large bowl, beat together the egg yolks and whole egg until thick and lemon-colored. Add the melted butter and sour cream, stirring to combine. Stir in the whiskey or rum. Gradually add the sifted flour until the mixture is well combined with a fork.
Roll out small portions of the dough on a floured surface into thin rounds about 1/4 inch thick. Cut each round into strips approximately 2-inch long. Fold each strip in half, then fold one end over the other to create a crescent shape. Fry the chrusciki in hot fat for about 1 minute on each side until lightly browned.
Remove from the fat with tongs and drain on paper towels. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
